events.name: ServerError
events.description: An unexpected error occurred while processing the request. Request ID: '{RequestId}'.

events.name: ServerErrorWithMessage
events.description: An error occurred while processing the request. Request ID: {RequestId}. Details: '{ErrorMessage:string}'.

domainErrorDescription.en: An error occurred while processing the request. Details: '{ErrorMessage:string}'.
domainErrorDescription.es: Se produjo un error al procesar la solicitud. Detalles: '{ErrorMessage:string}'.

events.name: ServiceUnavailable
events.description: Service unavailable (503). Request ID: {RequestId}. Details: '{ErrorMessage:string}'.

domainErrorDescription.en: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
domainErrorDescription.es: El servicio no está disponible temporalmente. Por favor, inténtalo más tarde.

events.name: RedisHostIsNotSpecified
events.description: Startup error: The Redis host configuration is missing.

events.name: RedisPortIsNotSpecified
events.description: Startup error: The Redis port configuration is missing.

events.name: RedisConnectionException
events.description: Startup error: Failed to connect to Redis. Details: '{ErrorMessage:string}'.

events.name: VaultConnectionException
events.description: Startup error: Failed to connect to the Vault. Details: '{ErrorMessage:string}'.

events.name: VaultSecretCastException
events.description: Startup error: Failed to cast retrieved secrets to the expected type. Details: '{ErrorMessage:string}'.

events.name: VaultTokenFileNotFound
events.description: Vault token file '{TokenFile:string}' was not found; set PNKL_VAULT_TOKEN manually.

events.name: VaultTokenFileIsEmpty
events.description: Vault token file '{TokenFile:string}' is empty; set PNKL_VAULT_TOKEN manually.

events.name: VaultTokenLoadedFromFile
events.description: Vault token successfully loaded from file '{TokenFile:string}'.

events.name: LocalConfigurationIsInUse
events.description: Local configuration is in use.

events.name: EndToEndTestsConfigurationIsInUse
events.description: End-to-end tests configuration is in use.

events.name: OptionsValidationException
events.description: Startup error: Options validation exception occurred. Details: '{ErrorMessage:string}'.

events.name: ConsulKvKeyNotFound
events.description: Startup error: Consul KV key '{StorageName:string}' was not found. Verify the key exists and the service name and environment are configured correctly.

events.name: ConsulKvInvalidJson
events.description: Startup error: Consul KV key '{StorageName:string}' returned null or invalid JSON.

events.name: ConsulConfigLoaded
events.description: Consul KV key '{StorageName:string}' loaded {KeyCount:int} key(s). Configuration (sensitive values redacted): {ConfigData:string}.

events.name: DefaultCacheValueError
events.description: Unable to store a default value {CacheValue}.

domainErrorDescription.en: An internal error occurred. Please try again.
domainErrorDescription.es: Se produjo un error interno. Por favor, inténtalo de nuevo.

events.name: PartialViewNotFound
events.description: Partial view '{PartialViewName:string}' could not be found. Details: '{ErrorMessage:string}'.

events.name: PartialViewRenderingError
events.description: An error occurred while rendering the partial view '{PartialViewName:string}'. Details: '{ErrorMessage:string}'.

events.name: ActionContextNotFound
events.description: Action context not found while trying to build an image URL from a Razor page.

events.name: ImageControllerGetMethodNotFound
events.description: Get image controller's method not found.

events.name: CsrfTokenValidationFailure
events.description: CSRF token validation failed.

domainErrorDescription.en: The request could not be validated. Please refresh the page and try again.
domainErrorDescription.es: La solicitud no pudo ser validada. Por favor, actualice la página e intente de nuevo.

events.name: ImageUploadError
events.description: An error occurred while uploading the image. Details: '{ErrorMessage:string}'.

events.name: ImageDownloadError
events.description: An error occurred while downloading the image. Details: '{ErrorMessage:string}'.

events.name: ImageRemovalError
events.description: An error occurred while removing the image. Details: '{ErrorMessage:string}'.

events.name: EntryImageCleanupFailure
events.description: Failed to remove image '{ImageId:Guid}' for entry '{EntryId:Guid}'. Details: '{ErrorMessage:string?}'.

events.name: EntryImageCleanupBatchError
events.description: Unexpected error while processing entry image cleanup batch. Details: '{ErrorMessage:string?}'.

events.name: EntryImageCleanupAbandoned
events.description: Giving up on cleaning entry '{EntryId:Guid}' after {FailureCount:int} attempts.

events.name: OrphanImageCleanupStarted
events.description: Orphan image cleanup run started.

events.name: OrphanImageCleanupCompleted
events.description: Orphan image cleanup run completed. Deleted {DeletedCount:int} images across {ScannedCount:int} scanned objects in {ElapsedSeconds:double} seconds.

events.name: OrphanImageCleanupFailed
events.description: Orphan image cleanup run failed. Details: '{ErrorMessage:string?}'.

events.name: FileUploadException
events.description: An error occurred while uploading the file. Details: '{ErrorMessage:string}'.

events.name: UnverifiedFileSignatureError
events.description: File signature verification failed. Details: '{ErrorMessage:string}'.

events.name: FileSignatureVerificationError
events.description: File signature verification failed for files with extension '{FileExtension:string}', '{HeaderBytes:string?}'.

events.name: RequestIdempotencyKeyViolation
events.description: Request idempotency key violation. The request with the same idempotency key '{IdempotencyKey:string}' is already being processed.

domainErrorDescription.en: A request with the same idempotency key is already being processed.
domainErrorDescription.es: Ya se está procesando una solicitud con la misma clave de idempotencia.

events.name: WarpContentEmpty
events.description: The entry content is empty.

domainErrorDescription.en: The entry content cannot be empty.
domainErrorDescription.es: El contenido de la entrada no puede estar vacío.

events.name: WarpExpirationPeriodEmpty
events.description: The entry expiration period is not specified.

domainErrorDescription.en: The entry expiration period must be set.
domainErrorDescription.es: El período de expiración de la entrada debe establecerse.

events.name: ImageRemovalDomainError
events.description: An error occurred in the domain layer while removing the image '{ImageId:Guid}'. Details: '{ErrorMessage:string}'.

events.name: IdDecodingError
events.description: An error occurred while decoding the ID '{Id:string}'. Details: '{ErrorMessage:string}'.

domainErrorDescription.en: An error occurred while decoding the ID.
domainErrorDescription.es: Se produjo un error al decodificar el ID.

events.name: UnauthorizedError
events.description: You do not have permission to perform this action.

domainErrorDescription.en: You do not have permission to perform this action.
domainErrorDescription.es: No tienes permiso para realizar esta acción.

events.name: CreatorIdIsNull
events.description: The creator ID is not provided.

domainErrorDescription.en: The creator ID is missing.
domainErrorDescription.es: Falta el ID del creador.

events.name: CreatorIdIsNotFound
events.description: The creator ID is not found.

domainErrorDescription.en: The creator was not found.
domainErrorDescription.es: El creador no fue encontrado.

events.name: CantAttachEntryToCreator
events.description: Can't attach the entry '{EntryId:Guid}' to the creator '{CreatorId:Guid}' due to an internal server error.

domainErrorDescription.en: An error occurred while attaching the entry to the creator.
domainErrorDescription.es: Se produjo un error al asociar la entrada al creador.

events.name: EntryModelValidationError
events.description: The entry model is invalid. Please check the provided data.

domainErrorDescription.en: The entry data is invalid. Please check the provided values.
domainErrorDescription.es: Los datos de la entrada no son válidos. Por favor, verifica los valores proporcionados.

events.name: NoPermissionError
events.description: You do not have permission to access this entry.

domainErrorDescription.en: You do not have permission to access this entry.
domainErrorDescription.es: No tienes permiso para acceder a esta entrada.

events.name: EntryNotFound
events.description: The entry '{EntryId:Guid}' was not found.

domainErrorDescription.en: The entry was not found.
domainErrorDescription.es: La entrada no fue encontrada.

events.name: EntryEditModeMismatch
events.description: The entry '{EntryId:Guid}' edit mode is already set to '{EditMode:string}'.

domainErrorDescription.en: The entry edit mode is already set and cannot be changed.
domainErrorDescription.es: El modo de edición de la entrada ya está establecido y no se puede cambiar.

events.name: EntryCannotBeEditedAfterViewed
events.description: The entry '{EntryId:Guid}' cannot be edited after it has been viewed.

domainErrorDescription.en: The entry cannot be edited after it has been viewed. Try to create a new entry.
domainErrorDescription.es: La entrada no puede editarse después de haber sido visualizada. Intenta crear una nueva entrada.

events.name: EntryInfoModelValidationError
events.description: The entry model is invalid. Please check the provided data.

domainErrorDescription.en: The entry data is invalid. Please check the provided values.
domainErrorDescription.es: Los datos de la entrada no son válidos. Por favor, verifica los valores proporcionados.

events.name: VaultCiphertextError
events.description: Failed to get ciphertext from encryption response. Details: '{ErrorMessage:string}'.

events.name: VaultPlaintextError
events.description: Failed to get plaintext from decryption response. Details: '{ErrorMessage:string}'.

events.name: EntryEditModeUnset
events.description: The entry '{EntryId:Guid}' edit mode is not set. Please set the edit mode before editing the entry.

domainErrorDescription.en: The entry edit mode is not set. Please set the edit mode before editing the entry.
domainErrorDescription.es: El modo de edición de la entrada no está configurado. Por favor, establécelo antes de editar la entrada.

events.name: EntryPlainTextSizeExceeded
events.description: The entry plain text content size exceeded the allowed limit.

domainErrorDescription.en: The entry text content is too large. Please reduce the size and try again.
domainErrorDescription.es: El contenido de texto de la entrada es demasiado grande. Por favor, redúcelo e inténtalo de nuevo.

events.name: EntryHtmlSizeExceeded
events.description: The entry HTML content size exceeded the allowed limit.

domainErrorDescription.en: The entry content is too large. Please reduce the size and try again.
domainErrorDescription.es: El contenido de la entrada es demasiado grande. Por favor, redúcelo e inténtalo de nuevo.

events.name: EntryContentDeltaRequired
events.description: The entry ContentDelta is required for Advanced mode entries.

domainErrorDescription.en: Content delta is required for advanced mode entries.
domainErrorDescription.es: El delta de contenido es obligatorio para las entradas en modo avanzado.

events.name: EntryContentDeltaInvalidJson
events.description: The entry ContentDelta must be valid JSON.

domainErrorDescription.en: The entry content delta is not valid JSON.
domainErrorDescription.es: El delta de contenido de la entrada no es JSON válido.

events.name: EntryContentDeltaSizeExceeded
events.description: The entry ContentDelta size exceeded the allowed limit.

domainErrorDescription.en: The entry content delta is too large. Please reduce the size and try again.
domainErrorDescription.es: El delta de contenido de la entrada es demasiado grande. Por favor, redúcelo e inténtalo de nuevo.

events.name: UnsupportedFileExtension
events.description: The file extension is not supported.

domainErrorDescription.en: The file extension '{FileExtension:string}' is not supported. Please use one of the following extensions: {SupportedFileExtensions:string}.
domainErrorDescription.es: La extensión de archivo '{FileExtension:string}' no está admitida. Por favor, usa una de las siguientes extensiones: {SupportedFileExtensions:string}.

events.name: ImageAlreadyExists
events.description: The image already exists.

domainErrorDescription.en: The image '{UntrustedImageName:string}' you are trying to upload already exists.
domainErrorDescription.es: La imagen '{UntrustedImageName:string}' que intentas subir ya existe.

events.name: MaliciousImageDetected
events.description: Image '{ImageId:Guid}' was flagged as malicious by GuardDuty and has been excluded from entry '{EntryId:Guid}'.

events.name: AllImagesMalicious
events.description: All {ImageCount:int} uploaded images for entry '{EntryId:Guid}' were flagged as malicious by GuardDuty. The entry cannot be created.

domainErrorDescription.en: All uploaded images were flagged as malicious. The entry cannot be created.
domainErrorDescription.es: Todas las imágenes subidas fueron marcadas como maliciosas. No se puede crear la entrada.

events.name: MalwareScanTimeout
events.description: Malware scan for image '{ImageId:Guid}' did not complete within the timeout period. The image will be treated as clean.

events.name: MalwareScanError
events.description: Malware scan for image '{ImageId:Guid}' failed. Details: '{ErrorMessage:string}'.

events.name: MaliciousImageRemovalFailed
events.description: Failed to remove malicious image '{ImageId:Guid}' from entry '{EntryId:Guid}'. Entry creation has been blocked. Details: '{ErrorMessage:string}'.

domainErrorDescription.en: One or more images failed a malware scan. The entry was not created.
domainErrorDescription.es: Una o más imágenes no superaron el análisis de malware. La entrada no fue creada.

events.name: S3ListObjectsError
events.description: An error occurred while listing objects in S3. Details: '{ErrorMessage:string}'.

domainErrorDescription.en: An error occurred while listing objects.
domainErrorDescription.es: Se produjo un error al listar los objetos.

events.name: S3DeleteObjectError
events.description: An error occurred while deleting an object from S3. Details: '{ErrorMessage:string}'.

domainErrorDescription.en: An error occurred while deleting an object.
domainErrorDescription.es: Se produjo un error al eliminar el objeto.

events.name: S3UploadObjectError
events.description: An error occurred while uploading an object to S3. Details: '{ErrorMessage:string}'.

domainErrorDescription.en: An error occurred while uploading an object.
domainErrorDescription.es: Se produjo un error al subir el objeto.

events.name: S3GetObjectError
events.description: An error occurred while getting an object from S3. Details: '{ErrorMessage:string}'.

domainErrorDescription.en: An error occurred while getting an object.
domainErrorDescription.es: Se produjo un error al obtener el objeto.

events.name: FileNameIsMissing
events.description: The file name is missing. Please provide a valid file name.

domainErrorDescription.en: The file name is missing.
domainErrorDescription.es: Falta el nombre del archivo.

events.name: FileIsEmpty
events.description: The file is empty. Please provide a valid file.

domainErrorDescription.en: The file is empty. Please provide a non-empty file.
domainErrorDescription.es: El archivo está vacío. Por favor, proporciona un archivo no vacío.

events.name: FileSizeExceeded
events.description: The file size is {Actual:long} bytes. Yoy can upload files up to {MaxFileSize:long} bytes.

domainErrorDescription.en: The file is too large. Please upload a smaller file.
domainErrorDescription.es: El archivo es demasiado grande. Por favor, sube un archivo más pequeño.

events.name: FileTypeNotPermitted
events.description: The provided file type is not permitted.

domainErrorDescription.en: This file type is not permitted.
domainErrorDescription.es: Este tipo de archivo no está permitido.

events.name: MultipartReaderError
events.description: An error occurred while creating the MultipartReader. Probably the request is not a multipart/form-data request.

domainErrorDescription.en: The request format is invalid.
domainErrorDescription.es: El formato de la solicitud no es válido.

events.name: MultipartContentTypeBoundaryError
events.description: The content-type boundary is missing. Please provide a valid content-type boundary.

domainErrorDescription.en: The request content type is invalid.
domainErrorDescription.es: El tipo de contenido de la solicitud no es válido.

events.name: MultipartBoundaryLengthLimitExceeded
events.description: The multipart boundary length limit has been exceeded. Please provide a valid content-type boundary.

domainErrorDescription.en: The request boundary limit has been exceeded.
domainErrorDescription.es: El límite de frontera de la solicitud ha sido superado.
